mapper.select:
SELECT a.AREA_ID as "areaId", a.REGION_ID as "regionId", a.SEARCH_TYPE as "searchType", a.NAME as "name", a.MAP_X as "mapX", a.MAP_Y as "mapY", a.CATEGORY as "category", a.ADDRESS as "address", a.ROAD_ADDRESS as "roadAddress", a.LINK as "link", a.TELEPHONE as "telephone", a.DESCRIPTION as "description", a.BOOKMARK_COUNT as "bookmarkCount", a.CREATE_DATE as "createDate", a.LATEST_DATE as "latestDate", a.STATUS as "status" FROM AREA a WHERE a.REGION_ID IN ( SELECT r.REGION_ID FROM REGION r WHERE r.ZDO_CODE = #{zdoCode} )
AND a.SEARCH_TYPE = #{searchType}
AND LOWER(a.NAME) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY a.AREA_ID OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT REGION_ID as "regionId", SEARCH_TYPE as "searchType", NAME as "name", MAP_X as "mapX", MAP_Y as "mapY", CATEGORY as "category", ADDRESS as "address", ROAD_ADDRESS as "roadAddress", LINK as "link", TELEPHONE as "telephone" FROM AREA WHERE AREA_ID = #{areaId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
SELECT GENERATE_PK('A', 'SEQ_AREA')
INSERT INTO AREA ( AREA_ID, SEARCH_TYPE, REGION_ID, PLACE_ID, NAME, CATEGORY, MAP_X, MAP_Y, ADDRESS, ROAD_ADDRESS, LINK, TELEPHONE, DESCRIPTION, BOOKMARK_COUNT ) VALUES ( #{areaId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'PLACE', #{regionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{placeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mapX, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mapY, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roadAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{link, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{telephone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT AREA_ID FROM AREA WHERE PLACE_ID = #{placeId} AND SEARCH_TYPE = 'PLACE'
